payload.answer: I can’t save current weather as durable memory because it’s transient and time-sensitive.
repair_options: Do not save this as memory.
If you want a durable preference or pattern saved instead, rephrase it, e.g. “I prefer cloudy weather” or “My area is often cloudy in the mornings.”
